'''tapafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jiboya|jiboya]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jiboya|jiboya]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tapafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæpæfæth|tæpæfæth]] || [[word:tæpæfæj|tæpæfæj]] || [[word:tæpæfæsh|tæpæfæsh]] || [[word:tæpæfæ|tæpæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tapapafath|tapapafath]] || [[word:tapapafaj|tapapafaj]] || [[word:tapapafash|tapapafash]] || [[word:tapapafa|tapapafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tapafath|tapafath]] || [[word:tapafaj|tapafaj]] || [[word:tapafash|tapafash]] || [[word:tapafa|tapafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tapaffath|tapaffath]] || [[word:tapaffaj|tapaffaj]] || [[word:tapaffash|tapaffash]] || [[word:tapaffaf|tapaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tapafatha|tapafatha]] || [[word:tapafaja|tapafaja]] || [[word:tapafasha|tapafasha]] || [[word:tapafaka|tapafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tapafath|tapafath]] || [[word:tapafaj|tapafaj]] || [[word:tapafash|tapafash]] || [[word:tapafa|tapafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tapafathal|tapafathal]] || [[word:tapafajal|tapafajal]] || [[word:tapafashal|tapafashal]] || [[word:tapafakal|tapafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tapafathatha|tapafathatha]] || [[word:tapafajaja|tapafajaja]] || [[word:tapafashasha|tapafashasha]] || [[word:tapafaka|tapafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tapafathan|tapafathan]] || [[word:tapafajan|tapafajan]] || [[word:tapafashan|tapafashan]] || [[word:tapafakan|tapafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tapafathaoro|tapafathaoro]] || [[word:tapafajaoro|tapafajaoro]] || [[word:tapafashaoro|tapafashaoro]] || [[word:tapafakaoro|tapafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
